title: heritiera sumatrana
intro: Heritiera sumatrana, also known as the Sumatran ironwood, is a species of tree in the family Malvaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Heritiera sumatrana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant are numerous, including its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health and boost the immune system. Heritiera sumatrana is commonly used in traditional medicine, and its herbal preparations often include extracts, infusions, and decoctions made from its bark, leaves, and roots.
